$comment: Layer B selection cases for TABSUM vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O1/O2, docs/occurs.md). Input is four amounts (one per line) read into W-VAL OCCURS 4 TIMES, summed through a PERFORM VARYING loop index, with a 2% fee ROUNDED. Candidate B drops the last table cell (the off-by-one bound defect); any case with a non-zero fourth amount catches it. Cases cover a typical table, a rounding half-cent, the all-equal case, a zeroed table, and a table whose weight is entirely in the last cell.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TABSUM (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-tabsum)
